rationale: In the citing paper, Stephen and Galak (2012) is cited only as one example of prior firm-level research linking social media/earned media activity to sales outcomes. The citation is grouped with Trusov et al. (2009) to set up a contrast that prior work focused on aggregate business outcomes, whereas this paper studies individual-level effects on the poster. The paper does not build on the cited study's model, data, measures, or specific findings beyond this broad background framing.
